prompt_text: A seagull stands on the exterior of a car windshield in a sunny parking lot. A single french fry sits on the dashboard inside. The bird stares intensely at the fry before lunging, miraculously shattering the windshield glass to grab the food. The background features parked cars and retail buildings under a clear blue sky.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A seagull stands on the exterior of a car windshield in a sunny parking lot. A single french fry sits on the dashboard inside. The bird stares intensely at the fry before lunging, miraculously shattering the windshield glass to grab the food. The background features parked cars and retail buildings under a clear blue sky.

cinematography.cameraShot: Point-of-view (POV) from inside the car dashboard, static low-angle looking up at the bird through the glass.

actions: The seagull looks around while perched on the car's hood.
The bird notices the french fry on the dashboard and stares directly at it.
The seagull lunges downward, smashing through the windshield glass.
The bird successfully grabs the fry with its beak and pulls back through the hole.
The seagull flies away as glass shards remain on the dashboard.
dialogue: [Rustling and clicking of the bird's beak]
[Ambient parking lot sounds: distant traffic and wind]
